title: Design a data migration service for GCP
shortDescription: Design a service that can migrate large datasets from existing data sources to Google Cloud Platform, including task scheduling capabilities and efficient handling of very large file transfers.

Were You Asked This?
Design a data migration service for GCP

Design a service that can migrate large datasets from existing data sources to Google Cloud Platform, including task scheduling capabilities and efficient handling of very large file transfers.

Asked at:

Google

Early March, 2026

Google

Manager

Early December, 2025

Google

Senior Manager

Design a file copying service that moves tons of files/folders (in GBs) from one cloud location to another.

Areas probed:
- Resumable downloads for large files in case of failures
- Failures in copying during mid-way
- Handle file changes after copying

Early October, 2025

Google

Manager

Question focussed on Task Scheduler design and then deep dive on managing transfer of very large files.

Premium
• 1天前

This is high level just combination of job scheduler and youtube. Part of it focusses on how these data transfer jobs will be scheduled and executed and other part focusses on resumability, chunking of files etc.
